name: Death
tagline: Command undead and drain the life force of the living.

baseAbility.name: Ghost Strike / Reanimate
baseAbility.description: Standard action. Ghost Strike (0 SP): ranged touch attack (medium range) that fatigues a living target for 1 round/CL (Fort negates); has no effect on undead or constructs. Reanimate (1 SP, touch): raise an intact corpse as a skeleton or zombie for 1 min/CL, obeying simple commands. You also choose one bonus (undead) talent when you first gain this sphere.

talents.name: Improved Reanimation
talents.description: Reanimated undead gain a +4 enhancement bonus to Strength and Dexterity.

talents.name: Sustained Reanimation
talents.description: Maintain one reanimated undead through concentration instead of a fixed duration, at half the usual HD cost against your undead limit.

talents.name: Permanent Undead
talents.description: Make a reanimated undead permanent instead of temporary.

talents.name: Mass Reanimate
talents.description: Reanimate multiple corpses with a single casting.

talents.name: Ranged Death
talents.description: Increase the range of your ghost strike, reanimate touch, and dominion abilities by one step. Repeatable.

talents.name: Corpse Bomb
talents.description: Detonate a corpse or mindless undead into a ghost-strike burst, destroying it in the process.

talents.name: Necrotic Feeding
talents.description: A harsher ghost strike option that deals direct damage and can heal you or your undead for some of the damage dealt.

talents.name: Instill Ghost Strike
talents.description: Bottle a ghost strike into a splash-weapon liquid that anyone can throw later.

talents.name: Inflict Disease
talents.description: Ghost strike can inflict an ongoing disease on a failed save instead of its normal effect.

talents.name: Dominion
talents.description: Gain a limited command ability over undead that fail a save, useful for negotiating with or controlling undead you didn't personally raise.
